decision_log.decision: This is a new failure — first occurrence
decision_log.rationale: Only 1 failure in the last 7 days. Model ran successfully yesterday (2026-03-11). This is a new issue, not recurring.

tool_calls.input: SELECT STATUS, CREATED_AT, EXECUTION_TIME, MESSAGE FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS WHERE NAME = 'gpm_repeat_buyer_dim' AND CREATED_AT >= DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
